requirement: Multi-leg strategy instruments, CSD custody accounts and transfers

tasks.title: Multi-leg instruments + CSD types/stores/handlers/gateway
tasks.description:
Add multi-leg strategies and CSD integration.

APPEND to types.go:
- StrategyLeg struct: InstrumentID, Ratio int, Side string (BUY/SELL) — json tags
- Strategy struct: ID, Name, StrategyType (SPREAD/STRADDLE/STRANGLE/BUTTERFLY/CALENDAR), Legs []StrategyLeg, Status (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED), TenantID, CreatedAt — json tags
- CustodyAccount struct: ID, FirmID, CSDAccountNumber, AccountType (TRADING/SETTLEMENT/SAFEKEEPING), Status (ACTIVE/FROZEN), CreatedAt — json tags
- CustodyBalance struct: AccountID, InstrumentID, AvailableQty int, PledgedQty int, PendingSettlementQty int, UpdatedAt — json tags
- CSDTransfer struct: ID, FromAccountID, ToAccountID, InstrumentID, Quantity int, TransferType (DVP/FOP), Status (PENDING/COMPLETED/FAILED), Reference, CreatedAt, CompletedAt — json tags

APPEND to store.go:
- StrategyStore: Create, Get, List, Delete + InMemory
- CustodyAccountStore: Create, Get, ListByFirm, UpdateStatus + InMemory
- CustodyBalanceStore: Get(accountID, instrumentID), Update, ListByAccount + InMemory
- CSDTransferStore: Create, Get, List, Complete(id), Fail(id, reason) + InMemory

Create handlers:
- handlers_strategy.go: POST /api/v1/securities/strategies (validate: name, type, at least 2 legs), GET list, GET /{id}, DELETE /{id}
- handlers_csd.go: POST /api/v1/securities/csd/accounts, GET /csd/accounts (?firm_id=), GET /csd/accounts/{id}/balances, POST /csd/transfers (validate: from+to accounts, instrument, quantity>0, type DVP/FOP), GET /csd/transfers, POST /csd/transfers/{id}/complete, POST /csd/transfers/{id}/fail

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for multi-leg + CSD
tasks.description:
Write tests.

1. store_test.go:
- TestStrategyStore_Create_Get_List_Delete
- TestCustodyAccountStore_Create_ListByFirm
- TestCustodyBalanceStore_GetUpdate
- TestCSDTransferStore_Create_Complete_Fail

2. handlers_strategy_test.go:
- TestCreateStrategy → 201
- TestCreateStrategy_InvalidLegs → 400
- TestListStrategies
- TestDeleteStrategy → 200

3. handlers_csd_test.go:
- TestCreateCustodyAccount → 201
- TestListAccountsByFirm
- TestGetBalances
- TestCreateTransfer_DVP → 201
- TestCompleteTransfer → 200
- TestFailTransfer → 200

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
